merchant_id.description: Braintree merchant ID; substituted into every request path (merchants/{{ config.merchant_id }}/...).

public_key.description: Braintree public key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username. Never logged.

private_key.description: Braintree private key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Braintree API base URL. Defaults to the sandbox host, matching legacy's default when its 'environment' config is unset or not 'production'. Set to https://api.braintreegateway.com for production.

page_size.description: Records per page (matches legacy's page_size query param and defaultPageSize).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
